miniapp.name: PowerBase
miniapp.subtitle: Electric Power & HP Converter
miniapp.description: Convert electric power between any unit and horsepower. Calculate current (Amps) for DC, AC single-phase and 3-phase circuits. Every calculation logs permanently on Base.
miniapp.ogDescription: Electric power ↔ HP converter & current calculator. Every calc logs on Base.
